error.signature: Error response from daemon: conflict: unable to remove image (image is being used)

verdict.summary: Can't delete image because a container (running or stopped) is using it.

dead_ends.why_fails: May break running containers that depend on this image

dead_ends.action: Delete all images with docker image prune -a
dead_ends.why_fails: Deletes ALL unused images - may remove images you still want

workarounds.action: Remove containers using the image first: docker ps -a | grep <image>
workarounds.how:
docker rm $(docker ps -aq --filter ancestor=<image>)
docker rmi <image>

workarounds.action: Use docker system prune to clean up all unused resources safely
workarounds.how: Use docker system prune to clean up all unused resources safely

frequently_confused_with.distinction: 'Error response from daemon' is a resource_error error while 'Error starting userland proxy' has a different failure mode despite similar symptoms. Check error message details to differentiate.
